analysis.summary: Grafana is a comprehensive observability platform that processes metrics and logs from multiple data sources, renders interactive dashboards with real-time visualizations, and manages alerting workflows for monitoring and incident response.
capabilities: Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Manages alerting rules evaluation and notification delivery to external systems (pkg/services/ngalert/)
Provides user authentication and authorization with RBAC (pkg/services/auth/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
Manages dashboard provisioning and configuration as code (pkg/services/provisioning/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Handles data source configuration and health monitoring (pkg/services/datasources/)
Manages team-based access control and organizational units (pkg/services/team/, pkg/services/org/)
technical_stack: Go (primary backend language, go.mod files throughout)
Grafana UI component library (@grafana/ui in package.json)

technical_facts: Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Manages alerting rules evaluation and notification delivery to external systems (pkg/services/ngalert/)
Provides user authentication and authorization with RBAC (pkg/services/auth/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
Manages dashboard provisioning and configuration as code (pkg/services/provisioning/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Handles data source configuration and health monitoring (pkg/services/datasources/)
Manages team-based access control and organizational units (pkg/services/team/, pkg/services/org/)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: Go goroutines with HTTP server handling concurrent requests, background services for alerting evaluation and provisioning
dependencies: Infrastructure: External data sources (Prometheus, InfluxDB, etc.)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/) and Renders interactive data visualizations and dashboards from multiple data sources (public/app/core/services/backend_srv.ts)
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: API endpoints with specific paths like /api/dashboards/db and /api/tsdb/query (pkg/api/) but handles multiple data source formats from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/) and Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Go goroutines with HTTP server handling concurrent requests, background services for alerting evaluation and provisioning with Redis caching layer (pkg/infra/remotecache/)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High plugin architecture (pkg/plugins/), multi-database support (SQLite/PostgreSQL/MySQL), and modular data source integration (pkg/tsdb/) make it adaptable. Core time-series aggregation and visualization logic is domain-agnostic.

evidence_claims.evidence: Processes and queries metrics from Prometheus, InfluxDB, Elasticsearch and other data sources (pkg/tsdb/)
Processes plugin installations and manages plugin lifecycle (pkg/plugins/)
Executes real-time log streaming and search capabilities (public/app/features/logs/)
SQLite (default database, pkg/services/sqlstore/), PostgreSQL (supported database, docker/blocks/postgres/), MySQL (supported database, pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/)
